§6Jetpack Tiers§f

§aUnshackle yourself from gravity and conquer the skies with modular RF flight!§f
The §9Iron Jetpacks§f mod introduces tiered, RF-powered jetpacks worn in your chestplate slot. By upgrading through various technological tiers, you can dramatically increase your flight speed, acceleration, and internal energy buffer.

§6Enabled Flight Tiers§f:
This modpack features a custom progression. Several standard tiers (Wood, Stone, Silver, Gold, Diamond, and Emerald) have been §cdisabled§f. Plan your upgrades along the following active path:
§b• Copper§f (Tier 1): The entry-level jetpack. Stores §e250,000 RF§f and consumes §c85 RF/tick§f.
§b• Bronze & Iron§f (Tier 2): Stores §e800,000 RF§f and consumes §c120 RF/tick§f.
§b• Steel & Invar§f (Tier 3): Stores §e12,000,000 RF§f and consumes §c350 RF/tick§f.
§b• Electrum§f (Tier 3 Alt): Stores §e10,000,000 RF§f and consumes §c310 RF/tick§f.
§b• Platinum§f (Tier 4): The ultimate late-game jetpack. Stores a massive §e36,000,000 RF§f and consumes §c720 RF/tick§f.

§6Crafting & Upgrades§f:
Jetpacks are upgraded sequentially. Place your previous tier's jetpack in the center of the grid, surrounded by the next tier's structural metal ingots (such as Steel or Platinum) and the matching tier's §bcoils§f (Basic, Advanced, Elite, Ultimate) to upgrade it. All energy stored in the lower-tier jetpack is §apreserved during the upgrade§f.

§eTip§f: Start your journey by crafting a Copper Jetpack.
